name: MHTC Medical Travel Assistance Fund
description: A fund managed in partnership with MHTC to subsidize travel and accommodation for patients undergoing major surgeries in Malaysia.

name: ASEAN Heart Care Initiative
description: NGO-driven initiative providing financial aid specifically for complex cardiothoracic surgeries for underprivileged ASEAN citizens.

name: MAKNA (National Cancer Council) Support Fund
description: Provides financial assistance for cancer treatments, medication, and essential medical equipment for patients in need.
